text:
Waltz is a member of the Military Police Brigade.

Appearance

Waltz is a man of average height and build, with short blond hair. He is only ever seen wearing the standard Military Police uniform.

Story

The Female Titan arc

Waltz accompanies Nile Dok during Eren Yeager's trial. When Eren attempts to argue on his own behalf, Waltz prepares to execute him on Nile's order, only to be interrupted by Levi, who begins savagely beating Eren.

Return to Shiganshina arc

On the evening of the mission to retake Wall Maria, Waltz stands with Nile among the other Military leaders, saluting the Survey Corps farewell before their expedition to Shiganshina District.
